meaning: n.力量,武力,精力,魄力,势力,暴力,[复]军队,影响力vt.强制,强加,(用武力)夺取,促使,推动,施加压力
examples: Is religion always a force for good?
They realized the force of her argument.
The juice is extracted by centrifugal force.
She's the woman who built eBay from a scrappy start-up to a global force.
She said her mother had been knocked out of bed by the force of the blows.
